title: wasm/client: unbounded online_users growth on user_joined without directory_list reset
description: In wasm/src/client.rs set_event_callback(), user_joined events call users.insert(pos, new_user) but there is no cap on the online_users Vec. The relay should send directory_list periodically to reset the list, but if the relay only sends user_joined notifications (e.g. on reconnect without a fresh directory_list), the Vec can grow unbounded. If the relay is compromised or buggy and sends many spurious user_joined events with distinct pub_ids, this grows the WASM heap without limit. The directory_list handler correctly calls users.truncate(MAX_USERS_IN_DIRECTORY) but the user_joined path does not.
